games.prediction_basis: PD/G差 Renegades 3-0 vs Aviators 0-3 expansion team. Austin Reed W1-3 763yd/9TD leader. +4% home (U004). W4 threshold 80% passed (85%).
games.note: 【UPSET MISS】Columbus Aviators (0-3 expansion) 28-14 Arlington Renegades (3-0). Game played 4/17 at Historic Crew Stadium, Columbus. Odds: Renegades @1.34 GO -> MISS -1.0u. | 2026-04-17 odds update log: @1.36 -> @1.34. | Score confirmed 4ソース: FOX boxscore・ESPN scoreboard・UFL theufl.com/scores/100・record logic (Dallas 3-0→3-1, Columbus 0-3→1-3).

miss_analysis.location: Historic Crew Stadium, Columbus OH (Aviators home)

factor_analysis.L1_PD_miss: Season PD/G差はRenegades優位だったが、expansion team 0-3 は small sample size で実質的な地力差を過大評価していた (UFU02)
factor_analysis.L3_rushing_dominance: Aviators 202 rushing yards vs Renegades 97 - ラン攻撃で2倍以上の圧倒。時計支配 TOP 36:38 vs 23:22
factor_analysis.L3_qb_efficiency: Reed 48%完成率 (シーズン平均から大幅ダウン)、McClendon 66%完成率 (安定)
factor_analysis.L4_home_advantage: 初のホーム開催、expansion team初勝利のモチベーション
factor_analysis.L4_rematch_motivation: Week 3 で 23-28 の5点差惜敗→ホームでのリマッチ motivation

miss_analysis.key_takeaway: Renegades の 3-0 ランキングは、前3戦の対戦相手が脆弱だった可能性を精査していなかった。Aviators (expansion) は Week 3 の 5点差惜敗から明確に成長しており、L1指標 (PD/G) がその成長を反映していなかった。Austin Reed の完成率48%は彼の本来の成績から乖離しており、Aviators defense の good game を示す。
miss_analysis.new_pattern_candidate: UFL/expansion league における 'expansion team home rematch after narrow road loss' パターン → rule_pipeline P015 候補として追加

games.caution_reason: conf 78% < Week4 threshold 80% (U008). L1 PASS: PD/G diff 18.7 (DC+16.7 vs STL-2.0). DC away -4% (U004). Ta'amu confirmed (W3 active). EV+12.3% (market 1.44). STL at home + Week3 comeback ability. Upgrade from 'QB unconfirmed' CAUTION to 'analyzed CAUTION'.
games.note: CAUTION: DC Defenders (away) vs St. Louis Battlehawks (home). L1 PASS (PD/G diff 18.7 > threshold 4). DC has best PD in league (+16.7/G). But DC is away (-4%), and conf 78% < W4 required 80%. STL showed resilience (W3 comeback 34-30 from 30-20 deficit). Ta'amu confirmed as DC starter. Monitor for any lineup/injury news closer to game.

qb_status.DC: Jordan Ta'amu confirmed (W3: 15/27 173yd 1TD, 45-7 blowout win)。MVP of 2025 UFL Championship。
qb_status.STL: Harrison Frost (came off bench W3: 9/15 148yd 3TD comeback 34-30 vs Stallions)

games.note_correction: Session_61: original date 2026-04-19, actual 2026-04-18. Note: records match label 'DC @ STL' but per recap game played at Audi Field (DC home). Score reflected without re-labeling home/away (out-of-scope).

verification.facts: DC 28 - STL 22 (2026-04-18). Defenders extended lead with back-to-back FGs in 4Q; Battlehawks pulled within 6 then Frost pass intercepted in red zone. Source: foxsports.com/ufl/week-4-st-louis-battlehawks-vs-dc-defenders-apr-18-2026-game-boxscore-101, theufl.com/scores/83.

verification.facts: ORL 16 - BHM 0 (2026-04-18, Protective Stadium Birmingham). Orlando 4-0 unbeaten; Birmingham 1-3 shutout. Source: foxsports.com/ufl/week-4-orlando-storm-vs-birmingham-stallions-apr-18-2026-game-boxscore-102, theufl.com/scores/105.

games.prediction_basis: PD/G diff +19.00pt (DC +14 vs BHM -5) strong. Market DC fav implied 73%, vig-adj 68.6%. L4: DC home +3, BHM internal turmoil (player departure) +3, DC momentum +2 = raw conf 76%. U008_modified Week3-6 cap 70% enforced -> conf 70%. EV +70*1.37-1 = -4.1%. SKIP.
games.notes: W5 完了後の DC Defenders 3連勝/Birmingham 3連敗。内部問題あり (player departure reports)。Stallions は historic dynasty だが 2026 cycle で弱体化。GO閾値 conf>=78 AND EV>+7 未達。

verification.facts: DC 45 - BHM 28 (2026-04-24, Audi Field). Source: foxsports.com/ufl/week-5-dc-defenders-vs-birmingham-stallions-apr-24-2026-game-boxscore-103, theufl.com/scores/106.

games.prediction_basis: PD/G diff +11.75pt. Market ORL implied 61.3%, vig 57.9%. L4: ORL home +3, ORL 4-0 momentum +3, STL road -2, STL last-game recovery +1 = conf 69%. Under cap 70%. EV 0.69*1.63-1 = +12.47%. But conf<78 GO threshold. SKIP.
games.notes: Orlando 4-0 undefeated, home vs STL 2-2 road game. Week6 raw conf 69%. EV+12% but Basic Tier GO (conf>=78 AND EV>+7) 未達. Q3 output_a 85% threshold も未達.
